title: Zesty Role
description: A Zesty.io role defines a set of permissions that can be assigned to users for controlling access to instance resources.

ZUID.description: The Zesty Universal Identifier for the role.

instanceZUID.description: The instance ZUID this role is scoped to.

systemRole.description: Whether this is a built-in system role.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the role was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the role was last updated.
